404.title: Page Not Found
404.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

500.title: Server Error
500.message: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.message: You don't have permission to access this resource.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.message: Access to this resource is forbidden.

networkError.title: Network Error
networkError.message: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection.

timeoutError.title: Request Timeout
timeoutError.message: The request took too long. Please try again.

validationError.title: Validation Error
validationError.message: Please check your input and try again.

generic.title: Error
generic.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
